scenarios.name: baseline — flash loans widget renders, execute button disabled

expected.notes: No steps added yet; assert defi-flash-loans-widget mounts with flash-add-step-button visible and flash-execute-button disabled.

scenarios.name: build liquidation bundle — add SWAP step

expected.notes: Adding a SWAP step enables the Execute bundle button and populates the bundle operations list.

scenarios.name: execute flash bundle — liquidation trade row appears

expected.notes: Executes the atomic flash bundle (FLASH_BORROW → SWAP → FLASH_REPAY); emits a FLASH_BORROW ledger row.

scenarios.name: P&L preview shows net gain before execution

expected.notes: Reactive-only — P&L preview panel (gross profit, flash fee, gas estimate, net P&L) is visible after steps are added.
